sub_modules.conv3d_stream_indexer: Combinational conversion from flattened stream index to depth, row, and column coordinates.
sub_modules.conv3d_window_valid: Combinational valid-window detector for padding-free stride-1 3D convolution positions.
sub_modules.conv3d_window_reader: Combinational 3D line/frame/depth window extractor from the buffered input volume, with current-cycle voxel forwarding.
sub_modules.conv3d_mac_tree: Combinational multiply-accumulate block for the flattened 3D window and kernel coefficients.
